name: surgegraph-facade-pp-mcp
description: Surgegraph Facade API surface as MCP tools.

surgegraph_token.title: SURGEGRAPH_TOKEN
surgegraph_token.description: Sets SURGEGRAPH_TOKEN for the Surgegraph Facade MCP server. Run `surgegraph-pp-cli auth login` once to obtain a token (OAuth 2.1 + PKCE + Dynamic Client Registration against https://mcp.surgegraph.io/token), then paste the access token here.
